initial_analysis.rough_description: A gameplay scene from a racing game where a character is driving through a track partially obscured by large, dark ink splatters. A banana item is positioned in the lower foreground, and a small video overlay of a person wearing a headset is visible in the top right corner.

The scene is a first-person perspective gameplay of a kart racing game. The player's vision is heavily obscured by large, dark ink splats on the screen. A small inset video of a streamer is visible in the top right corner. The racing environment includes a track with a rainbow-colored floor and various race-related items like banana peels.

object_seeds.label: banana
object_seeds.notes: Small banana peel on the track, potentially useful as a trackable environmental hazard.

object_seeds.label: streamer
object_seeds.tracking_prompt: person in the top right inset window
object_seeds.notes: The streamer in the small inset view.

initial_analysis.rough_description: A gameplay scene from a retro racing game where the player, represented by a purple vehicle, is racing on a track. The screen is partially obscured by black ink blobs from a game item. A video feed of the streamer is visible in the top-right corner, and various game UI elements are displayed throughout the interface.

initial_analysis.rough_description: The scene displays gameplay of a racing video game on a colorful, grid-lined rainbow track, heavily obscured by black ink splatters. In the top-right corner, a streamer is visible in a small window. At the bottom center of the game view, a small portion of a racing kart is visible beneath the ink.

object_seeds.label: streamer
object_seeds.tracking_prompt: person in the top right corner
object_seeds.notes: The streamer is the most clearly defined object in the scene.

object_seeds.notes: Although partially obscured by ink, the kart is a key gameplay object.

initial_analysis.rough_description: The scene shows a video game racing track partially obscured by large black ink splatters. A small circular webcam feed in the upper right corner displays a man wearing headphones playing the game. The screen also contains UI elements, including a race position indicator in the lower right corner and coin/item counts.

object_seeds.label: race position indicator
object_seeds.tracking_prompt: numerical race position indicator in lower right corner
